title: KPop Demon Hunters Wins Two Golden Globes at 2026 Awards
text: The Netflix and Sony Pictures Animation animated film claimed victories in best animated feature and best original song for Golden at the 83rd Annual Golden Globe Awards on January 11, 2026. The voice actress behind the character Rumi, one of the fictional K-pop group's three members, delivered an emotional acceptance speech. She reflected on her decade-long training journey at a major Korean entertainment label, noting that rejecting is redirection, so never give up. It's never too late to shine like you were born to be. The film centers on Huntrix, a girl group that combines pop music performances with monster-fighting adventures. The project has become Netflix's most popular title to date, with its soundtrack reaching the top 10 on the Billboard 200 chart. These Golden Globe wins matched the film's earlier success at the Critics Choice Awards, marking back-to-back achievements at major award ceremonies. A sequel is currently in development, with deals confirmed between the directors and both Netflix and Sony Animation for the next installment.
